query: Persona.js complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Unable to Verify Origanization - Bugs with Persona - Bugs - OpenAI Developer Community
results.content:
# Unable to Verify Origanization - Bugs with Persona

I am unable to verify my organization and its super frustrating. Persona is full of bugs and it doesnt allow me to try again saying session expired and to restart the process but doesnt allow to do that. OpenAI if you dont want us to use your services, then this is the best way to stop people from using openAI API’s. Persona is your biggest torn. I want to use simple api but now i tried to verify with both attempts failed with no chance to verify again. I hate this!!!

I managed to verify with Persona on Linkedin but with OpenAI I am not able to verify. I might as well start using gemini now. [...] I have the exact same issue. Persona will scan my ID but not my face. It fantasizes about several faces in the room, wants me to move my face closer until every pore is visible, but the current state of affairs is that it will not take a picture of my face. And I was able to verify with Persona on LinkedIn but not with OpenAI.

I want to use Agent Builder and use the preview functionality.

I can provide other means of identification if you require it. Please help us, the stranded Persona verification users, or offer an alternative identification provider. The Persona support is not helpful at all. They don’t take end users seriously. It is perhaps time to switch the provider? This does not cast a good light on OpenAI at all and prevents the use of agentic tools. [...] Hey did it get resolved ?

results.title: The broken OpenAI Persona Identity Verification: What It Is and Why It's Problematic - Feedback - OpenAI Developer Community
results.content:
I’ve been trying to verify identity, already tried twice, both times no success, although I tried to be the most precise and careful while capturing my face and ID. E-mailed support@openai , unfortunately only got an AI reply saying “sorry, no reset after trying”. This is incredibly frustrating and I can’t believe it’s not solved yet, since this directly impacts their revenue… I must also add to the privacy concerns mentioned. I hope OpenAI can better explain these issues other then “sorry no reset for you” answered by an AI support.

Invite someone to be a owner of your company, and they can try (link works again). Thats not the better way, but works (to get a new link). [...] It’s also broken because Persona verifys an individuals ID (like a passport or drivers license). I’m here on behalf of a company. What am I suppoed to do, verify my own private ID for the company? Or am I supposed to go and track down the company secretary and ask her to do it? What a mess.

Just failed for me also. (Turn head Left/Right camera pics never worked) – Retry goes to expired session (as repeatedly reported).

Necessity seems dubious… [...] :robot:

Given their deep involvement with government contracts and US taxpayer dollars, I can assure you they will not take further action on this matter. :money_bag::united_states:

:money_bag:
:united_states:

My only suggestion for everyone else facing this nuisance, despite paying for Pro subscriptions and/or Teams plans, is to:

:office_building:
:fu:

openai verification #SupportIssues #FoundationModels

Totally understand the frustration this has dragged on far too long.  
At this point escalating internally or exploring other providers sadly feels like the most realistic option.

The same thing happened to me, even though I completed the same verification process with Persona on LinkedIn a few months ago and it worked perfectly.

results.title: Troubleshooting common issues | Persona
results.content:
`new Persona.Client({ ... })` `client.destroy()` `new Persona.Client({ ... })` `iframe` `iframe` ## Server rendering The Persona JS SDK requires client-side JavaScript and cannot be server rendered. If you are using a server rendered framework such as next.js or Remix, you will need to use the framework’s client rendering escape hatch. ### next.js This error will manifest as `ReferenceError: self is not defined when using next.js`. To solve the problem, update your app structure to have a `next/dynamic` component that loads the component that imports the Persona package as a client component. Below is an implementation sample: `ReferenceError: self is not defined when using next.js` `next/dynamic` [...] | | | --- | | 1 | // YourServerRenderedPage.tsx -- server component | | 2 | import PersonaWrapper from './components/PersonaWrapper'; | | 3 | | | 4 | export default function Home() { | | 5 | return ( | | 6 |
| | 7 |

Here, you’ll see the Domain allowlist. Ensure that: ` ` If you are testing, please note: `localhost` `localhost` If you have a more complex setup, please note: `frameAncestors` ## Content Security Policy (CSP) violations If you have a Content Security Policy on your website, it can block Persona’s iframe. ### Example error messages `Framing ' violates the following Content Security Policy directive: 'frame-src 'self''` `Framing ' violates the following Content Security Policy directive: 'frame-src 'self''`

results.title: A Closer Look At Personas: What They Are And How They Work | 1 — Smashing Magazine
results.content: Measure effectiveness. Personas can be stand-in proxies for users when the budget or time does not allow for an iterative process. Various implementations of a design can be “tested” by pairing a persona with a scenario, similar to how we test designs with real users. If someone who is play-acting a persona cannot figure out how to use a feature or gets frustrated, then the users they represent will probably have a difficult time as well.
